name: d3code
description: Agentic terminal coding environment for Rocket D3.

scripts.regression: npm test && node dist/src/cli.js doctor && node dist/src/cli.js install-proof && node dist/src/cli.js manual-scope reference/d3_reference_manual_10.3.4_5-28-2026.pdf && node dist/src/cli.js manual-scope reference/d3_user_guide_version_10_3_4_2026-05-28-20-56-09.pdf && node dist/src/cli.js product-audit --with-acceptance --allow-incomplete && node dist/src/cli.js acceptance
